---
name: Bug Report
about: Report an error or inconsistency in the template or documentation
title: "[BUG]: "
labels: ["bug"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem description

Clearly describe the error or inconsistency you found.

## Location

Affected file or section (e.g. `README.md`, `.gitmessage`, `docs/...`).

## Expected behavior

What you expected the template/documentation to say or do.

## Actual behavior

What it currently says or does.

## Additional information (optional)

Screenshots, links, or any other useful context.
